message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "laboratory coordinator" as lc

participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as UI
participant ":ValidateTestReportController" as Ctrl
participant ":Company" as Company
participant "rp : TestStore" as TestStore
participant "rp : Test" as Test
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TRStore
participant "rp : TestReport" as TestReport
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TestDiagnosis

lc -> UI : 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis
activate UI

UI -> Ctrl : 2 createTestList()
activate Ctrl

Ctrl -> Company : 3 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate Company

Company -> TestStore : 4 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TestStore

TestStore -> Test : 5 get = getTestList()
activate Test
deactivate Test

deactivate TestStore

Company -> TestStore : 6 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TestStore

TestStore -> TRStore : 7 get = getTestReportList()
activate TRStore
deactivate TRStore

TestStore -> TestDiagnosis : 8 get = getTestDiagnosis()
activate TestDiagnosis
deactivate TestDiagnosis

deactivate TestStore

deactivate Company

ref over Ctrl, Company : US15_SD_testReportsDTO.puml

Ctrl --> UI : 9
deactivate Ctrl

UI --> lc : 10 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection
deactivate UI

lc -> UI : 11 chooses all tests
activate UI

UI --> lc : 12 asks for confirmation
deactivate UI

lc -> UI : 13 confirms selection
activate UI

UI -> Ctrl : 14 validateAllTestReport();
activate Ctrl

loop
Ctrl -> TestStore : 15 validateTestReport(testId);
activate TestStore

TestStore -> TestReport : 16 setState(VALIDATED);
activate TestReport
deactivate TestReport

TestStore -> TestReport : 17 registerValidationDate(date);
activate TestReport

TestReport -> TestReport : 18 setValidationDate(date);

deactivate TestReport

deactivate TestStore
end

Ctrl --> UI : 19 informs operation success
deactivate Ctrl

UI --> lc
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
